subcodes.first_line: O ye two sincere servants of the Blessed Beauty! Praise be to God that ye are eloquent and united, and like unto a lofty palm tree, bearing goodly fruit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده صادق جمال ابهی الحمد لله ناطقید و موافق و مانند نخل باسق ثمره طیبه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @thankfulness; gratitude, @service to others; to the Cause of God
